description_long: This is a wooden ladder with four evenly spaced horizontal rungs connecting two vertical side rails. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural, slightly rustic appearance, and the rails are subtly curved outward, adding a handcrafted feel. The rungs are rectangular and appear sturdy, suitable for supporting the weight of a person climbing. There are no visible safety features such as anti-slip feet or handrails, and the ends of the rails are flat and unadorned. The finish is matte, with a slight texture that suggests a grippy surface, and the color is a warm, medium brown typical of varnished wood. This ladder would be appropriate for use in garages, workshops, or for accessing moderately elevated areas in urban environments.
description: A medium-brown wooden ladder with four rectangular rungs and subtly curved side rails, featuring a natural wood grain and a matte, grippy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four rungs and the full width of the curved wooden side rails.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the ladder, with only the thickness of the rails visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing all four rungs and the wood grain on the rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the edge of the rails.
